faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Kilolab
faq.ctaSubtitle: Our team is available to help you

questions.howItWorksAnswer: It's simple! Place an order, a Washer picks up your laundry, washes, dries and folds it, then delivers it within 48h. You pay by weight (from €3/kg).
questions.sorting: Do I need to sort my laundry?
questions.sortingAnswer: No! That's the advantage of Kilolab. Our Washers handle sorting by color and fabric. Put everything in a bag, we take care of the rest.
questions.clothes: What clothes can I have washed?
questions.clothesAnswer: All your everyday clothes: t-shirts, pants, underwear, sheets, towels... For delicate items (silk, cashmere), we recommend a traditional dry cleaner.
questions.deliveryTimeAnswer: Standard: 48-72h. Express: 24h. You receive notifications at each step.
questions.pickupAnswer: Choose a pickup slot when ordering. The Washer comes directly to your home to collect your laundry bag.
questions.chooseWasherAnswer: Yes! When ordering, you can select a Washer near you or let our algorithm assign one.
questions.billingAnswer: You pay by weight. The final price is calculated after weighing by the Washer. 100% secure payment via Stripe.
questions.promo: Can I use a promo code?
questions.promoAnswer: Yes! Enter your code at checkout. Codes can be combined with referrals.
questions.referralAnswer: Share your unique code with friends. You get €10 credit per referral, and your friend also gets €10 on their first order.
questions.orderIssue: What if I have a problem with my order?
questions.orderIssueAnswer: Contact us within 48h via contact@kilolab.fr or from your dashboard. We handle all claims within 24 business hours.
questions.insuranceAnswer: Yes, all clothes are covered by our insurance up to €500 per order in case of damage.

form.messagePlaceholder: A question about an order? A partnership?

pricing.heroSubtitle: Two clear plans. No hidden fees.

express.description: Perfect if you're in a hurry.

comparison.title: The TRUE cost of your laundry
comparison.subtitle: What you really pay when doing your laundry yourself.
comparison.ctaTitle: You pay to LOSE 2h30 of your life?
comparison.ctaDesc: With Kilolab, for less than a round trip to the laundromat, you get 2h30 of free time back.

weight.a: The Washer weighs your bag in front of you with a digital scale during pickup. You validate the weight together.

minimum.a: Yes, the minimum is 3kg (€9 in Standard). That's roughly equivalent to a small machine load.

difference.q: What's the difference between Standard and Express?
difference.a: Standard (€3/kg): 48-72h, perfect for everyday. Express (€5/kg): 24h guaranteed, stain treatment included, boutique folding.
